name: chain__your_first_digital_product_should_take_
method: your first digital product should take 4 hours to make and sell for $47not 4 months. not a 200 page course. not some "comprehensive system"a single template that solves one specific problem for one s

stages.task: Extract single-problem pain points from Reddit, alpha, Fiverr demand data. Filter for: specific problem, identifiable persona, solvable with a template/checklist/tool
For top candidate: define exact deliverable (template type, format, word count <3000), title, subtitle, price ($27-$47), target persona in one sentence
Generate the actual product content: template, checklist, or tool. Max 10 pages. One problem, one solution, zero fluff
Generate paste-ready Gumroad/Whop listing: title, description, bullet points, price, cover image prompt. Apply engagement hooks from procedural memory
Generate 3 tweets + 1 thread + 1 Reddit value post promoting the product without being salesy. Use consequence-first hooks
